item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-031","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Negative control stayed asleep: the assistant routed the request as a release review/audit, asking for PR, commit range, diff, or release notes and framing the review around regression risk, security/config/migration risks, testing coverage, release/rollback risk, and user-facing behavior changes. It did not enter an artifact/product-strengthening loop merely because of the word “audit.”"}
